ai_summary: SmartestEnergy, a direct competitor in the UK I&C renewable energy market, has acquired Factorenergia for €204m to expand its global footprint into Iberia and Latin America. This signals competitive expansion and potential strategic shifts that may impact tem's competitive positioning.
